theme_and_archetype.vibe: Objective, authoritative, trust-focused, and data-driven. Not childish.
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Parents need clarity and trust. The Admin dashboard requires data-dense readability. The child interface needs to be subtle but clear. Stark white, precise grids, and high-contrast typography communicate reliability without feeling like a dystopian surveillance tool.

typography.anti_default_rule: Do not use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Lato for headings. No generic defaults.

headings.weight_strategy: Bold or Black for tension, tight tracking

rules.no_gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use solid colors or very subtle noise textures.
rules.tinted_grey: All greys must have a slight blue tint (cool grey) for a premium feel.
rules.hover_states: Always explicitly define hover text color (e.g., hover:bg-blue-700 hover:text-white). Do not rely on inheritance.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers to avoid text collision.

grid_modes.admin_dashboard: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12. Tight gap-4. Utilize h-full on children for uniform height. Every pixel utilized.
grid_modes.parent_dashboard: THE 'BENTO' GRID: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3. Gap-6. Overlapping bento boxes for screen time charts.
grid_modes.mobile_first: Default to grid-cols-1 on small screens. Ensure image heights do not exceed 80vh.

borders_and_surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-gray-200), no heavy default shadows. Add shadow-sm and -translate-y-1 strictly on hover.
borders_and_surfaces.child_banner: Persistent top banner spanning full width: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-800 border-b border-emerald-200 font-medium.

shadcn_overrides.buttons: rounded-md font-bold tracking-wide. Primary CTA uses brand blue (#0047FF) with high-contrast white text.
shadcn_overrides.cards: Remove default heavy shadows. Use 1px border. Add generous p-6.
shadcn_overrides.charts: Use Recharts/Shadcn charts with precise data tooltips. Remove axis grid lines for clean Swiss look.

specific_screens.role_selection: Vertical flex layout with large clickable bento areas for 'Parent', 'Child', 'Admin'.
specific_screens.parent_dashboard: Top level stats (Total Screen Time), followed by Bar/Line charts for App Usage (YouTube, IG, Chrome).
specific_screens.admin_dashboard: Dense table (Leads/Users) with Sticky Headers. Top row KPIs (Total, Active, Drop-offs).
specific_screens.premium_ui: Greyed out or disabled interactive elements with a 'Coming Soon' overlay/badge. Scaffolded Razorpay UI.
specific_screens.child_dashboard: Minimalist interface. Persistent 'Parental watch is ACTIVE' banner at the top. Alerts if monitoring is disabled.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle border darkening and -translate-y-1 on cards. Explicit text color changes on buttons.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have a 2px offset ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2).

media_and_images.rules: No placeholder URLs. Use provided Unsplash URLs.

onboarding_hero.description: Family walking outdoors - Use for onboarding or role selection background with heavy white glassmorphism overlay to ensure text contrast.

security_icon_replacement.description: Abstract lock image - Use sparingly for 'Parent Lock' or 'Premium' features as a decorative thumbnail, tightly cropped or masked.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., parent-login-button, child-status-banner, admin-users-table).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS and purely standard HTML/React tags combined with Shadcn UI where applicable.
Implement the UI using React JS.
Ensure the 'Child Mode' has a persistent top banner indicating monitoring is active.
For the 'Parent Mode', use Recharts to build the app usage charts (YouTube, Instagram, Chrome).
Admin Dashboard must be data-dense (Archetype 4) with clear grids, stark white backgrounds, and 1px borders.
Include 'data-testid' on ALL buttons, inputs, tabs, and critical text elements. DO NOT SKIP THIS.
Premium/Razorpay section must be visually structured but all actions disabled with a 'Coming Soon' or 'Premium Locked' badge.

Simulate mobile-first view if testing in browser: constrain max-width to mobile sizes (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto) with a subtle device border where applicable, though Admin panel should use full viewport width.
